mermaidSyntax:
graph TD subgraph Prep["Sample Preparation"] A[Cell Lysis
RIPA Buffer] --> B[BCA Protein Assay] B --> C[Reduction
DTT 5mM 56°C 30min] C --> D[Alkylation
IAA 15mM RT dark] end D --> QC1{QC: Protein
Concentration OK?} QC1 -->|No| A QC1 -->|Yes| E subgraph Digestion["Enzymatic Digestion"] E[Trypsin/Lys-C
1:50 ratio] --> F[Incubate
37°C Overnight] F --> G[C18 Cleanup
Desalting] end G --> QC2{QC: Peptide
Yield Check} QC2 -->|Fail| E QC2 -->|Pass| H subgraph Labeling["TMT Labeling"] H[TMT-10plex
Labeling] --> I[Quench
0.5% Hydroxylamine] I --> J[Label Check
LC-MS/MS] end J --> QC3{QC: Labeling
Efficiency >95%?} QC3 -->|No| H QC3 -->|Yes| K subgraph Fractionation["Fractionation"] K[High-pH RP
Chromatography] --> L[Collect
12 Fractions] end L --> QC4{QC: Fraction
Quality Check} QC4 -->|Fail| K QC4 -->|Pass| M subgraph MS["LC-MS/MS Analysis"] M[nanoLC-MS/MS
Orbitrap Exploris 480] --> N[120min Gradient
DDA Top20] end N --> QC5{QC: MS Quality
Metrics OK?} QC5 -->|No| M QC5 -->|Yes| O subgraph Analysis["Data Analysis"] O[MaxQuant/
Proteome Discoverer] --> P[FDR < 1%
Protein Identification] P --> Q[Statistical Analysis
log2FC > 1.5
adj.p < 0.05] end Q --> QC6{QC: Significant
Proteins Found?} QC6 -->|No| O QC6 -->|Yes| R subgraph Validation["Validation"] R[Western Blot
Top 5 Candidates] --> S[PRM Targeted
Assay] end S --> T[Final Report] style QC1 fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style QC2 fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style QC3 fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style QC4 fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style QC5 fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style QC6 fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style T fill:#22c55e,stroke:#16a34a,color:#fff
